expert_reasoning: All three models strongly agreed on bibliographic fields and sample size. I used the shared consensus for title, authors, journal, year, DOI, PMID link, and participant count. For descriptive fields, I merged the most complete consistent details: Anthropic provided the richest population, follow-up, and outcomes wording with high confidence, while OpenRouter added the explicit countries. Study design was unanimous but only moderate-confidence across models, so retained the shared label.

expert_field_level_decisions.study_design: All models agreed on retrospective_cohort_controlled despite only moderate confidence.
expert_field_level_decisions.population_assessed: Merged Anthropic's exact sample/timing with OpenRouter's country detail.
expert_field_level_decisions.follow_up_duration: Merged consensus wording: up to 12 months with mean last visit 8.9 months.
expert_field_level_decisions.outcome_measures: Used Anthropic/OpenRouter fuller list including VNRS and explantation.

expert_best_extraction.authors: Stauss T, El Majdoub F, Sayed D, Surges G, Rosenberg WS, Kapural L, Bundschu R, Lalkhen A, Patel N, Gliner B, Subbaroyan J, Rotte A, Edgar DR, Bettag M, Maarouf M
expert_best_extraction.title: A multicenter real-world review of 10 kHz SCS outcomes for treatment of chronic trunk and/or limb pain
expert_best_extraction.journal_name: Annals of Clinical and Translational Neurology
expert_best_extraction.study_question: What is the real-world efficacy of high-frequency spinal cord stimulation at 10 kHz for treating chronic trunk and/or limb pain in a large multicenter patient population?
expert_best_extraction.population_assessed: 1660 patients with chronic trunk and/or limb pain who were trialed and/or permanently implanted with 10 kHz HF-SCS between April 2014 and January 2018 across eight centers in the USA, Germany, and the UK.
expert_best_extraction.follow_up_duration: Up to 12 months post-implantation; mean time to last visit 8.9 months
expert_best_extraction.outcome_measures: Responder rate (≥50% pain relief from baseline), pain intensity scores (VNRS), function, sleep, quality of life, medication intake, and device explantation rate
expert_best_extraction.inclusion_criteria: Patients with chronic trunk and/or limb pain who were trialed and/or permanently implanted with 10 kHz HF-SCS between April 2014 and January 2018 at participating institutions.
expert_best_extraction.answer_to_study_question: 10 kHz HF-SCS provided sustained real-world benefit for chronic trunk and/or limb pain: over 70% of patients maintained at least 50% pain relief through 12 months, with 74.1% responders at last visit, and many also reported improved function, sleep, quality of life, and reduced medication use.

string_features.model_value: What is the real-world efficacy of high-frequency spinal cord stimulation at 10 kHz for treating chronic trunk and/or limb pain in a large multicenter patient population?
string_features.ground_truth_value: Assess real-world effectiveness of 10 kHz HF-SCS for chronic trunk and/or limb pain.

string_features.model_value: 1660 patients with chronic trunk and/or limb pain who were trialed and/or permanently implanted with 10 kHz HF-SCS between April 2014 and January 2018 across eight centers in the USA, Germany, and the UK.
string_features.ground_truth_value: 1660 patients trialed and/or permanently implanted with HF-SCS at 10 kHz

string_features.model_value: Up to 12 months post-implantation; mean time to last visit 8.9 months

10 kHz HF-SCS provided sustained real-world benefit for chronic trunk and/or limb pain: over 70% of patients maintained at least 50% pain relief through 12 months, with 74.1% responders at last visit, and many also reported improved function, sleep, quality of life, and reduced medication use.
string_features.ground_truth_value: HF-SCS at 10 kHz provided sustained ≥50% pain relief in over 70% of patients through 12 months, with last-visit responder rate 74.1%, and improvements in QoL, function, sleep, and reduced medication use; explant rate 3.7%.

string_features.model_value: Patients with chronic trunk and/or limb pain who were trialed and/or permanently implanted with 10 kHz HF-SCS between April 2014 and January 2018 at participating institutions.
string_features.ground_truth_value: Patients trialed and/or permanently implanted with HF-SCS at 10 kHz between April 2014 and January 2018.

string_features.model_value: Responder rate (≥50% pain relief from baseline), pain intensity scores (VNRS), function, sleep, quality of life, medication intake, and device explantation rate
string_features.ground_truth_value: Responder rate (≥50% pain relief) at 3, 6, 12 months and last visit; changes in pain intensity (VNRS), function, sleep, quality of life, and medication use.
